tags.description: Straža hill is the most beautiful viewpoint in Bled, overlooking the south-east shore of the lake and the entire Lake Bled, the castle, the Jelovica plateau and Stol mountain.
tags.name: Straža

tags.description: It has been declared an archaeological area, but on the summit you see nothing - only forest and some rocks.
